"C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe" -Command '$path = '"'C:\\Users\\oscar\\AI WORKBENCH\\devChorus\\CODEX_ENDPOINT\\sessions\\2d0cc98d.json'
"'$dir = Split-Path -Parent $path
$json = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $path | ConvertFrom-Json -Depth 100
$latest = $json.conversation[-1]
if ($latest.from -ne '"'opencode' -or "'$json.state -ne '"'running_codex' -or "'$json.last_bridge_run_id -ne '"'69993b2a') {
  throw \"Session preconditions failed\"
}
"'$now = (Get-Date).ToUniversalTime().ToString('"'o')
"'$entry = [ordered]@{
  id = '"'e0001'
  turn = 1
  from = 'codex'
  type = 'result'
  message = 'Smoke test acknowledged. I read and understood the session file and verified the protocol path works. Returning the session to OpenCode without marking it completed.'
  artifacts = @()
  timestamp = "'$now
  bridge_run_id = '"'69993b2a'
  metadata = @{}
}
"'$json.conversation += [pscustomobject]$entry
$json.updated_at = $now
$json.turn = 1
$json.revision = 3
$json.state = '"'awaiting_opencode'
"'$json.current_holder = '"'opencode'
"'$json.needs_input = $true
$out = $json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 100
$tmp = Join-Path $dir ('"'.2d0cc98d.json.' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') + '.tmp')
Set-Content -LiteralPath "'$tmp -Value $out -Encoding UTF8
try {
  $null = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $tmp | ConvertFrom-Json -Depth 100
  Move-Item -LiteralPath $tmp -Destination $path -Force
  $null = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $path | ConvertFrom-Json -Depth 100
} finally {
  if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $tmp) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $tmp -Force }
}

exec

"'$tmp = Join-Path $dir ('"'.2d0cc98d.json.' + [guid]::NewGuid().ToString('N') + '.tmp')
Set-Content -LiteralPath "'$tmp -Value $raw -Encoding UTF8
try {
  $validated = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $tmp | ConvertFrom-Json -Depth 100
  if ($validated.state -ne '"'awaiting_opencode' -or "'$validated.current_holder -ne '"'opencode' -or -not "'$validated.needs_input -or $validated.turn -ne 1 -or $validated.revision -ne 3 -or $validated.conversation.Count -ne 2 -or $validated.conversation[-1].from -ne '"'codex') {
    throw 'Post-write validation failed'
  }
  Move-Item -LiteralPath "'$tmp -Destination $path -Force
  $null = Get-Content -Raw -LiteralPath $path | ConvertFrom-Json -Depth 100
} finally {
  if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $tmp) { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $tmp -Force }
}
